input.existing_structure: center pod with separate spar brackets
input.problem: spar alignment takes repeated fitting
input.constraint: spar datum and anti-rotation key must remain visible

reasoning.rule: center spine and spar socket can integrate if datum remains exposed

output.proposal: integrated center spine and spar socket core
verification: inspect spar socket before wing module install

input.existing_structure: mission payload bay molded into center pod
input.problem: mission insert cannot be swapped
input.constraint: payload bay must remain removable and non-weapon

reasoning.rule: payload insert cannot be fused into fixed center body

output.proposal: reject fixed payload bay; use slide-in non-weapon mission payload insert
verification: fail if payload insert cannot slide out

input.existing_structure: sensor nose glued to pod
input.problem: sensor window and boom socket cannot be replaced
input.constraint: sensor bay and pitot/GPS boom must remain serviceable

reasoning.rule: sensor nose remains a removable service module

output.proposal: removable sensor nose with clear window and boom socket
verification: remove sensor nose after wing assembly

input.existing_structure: battery tray hidden below mission bay
input.problem: CG adjustment requires opening payload module
input.constraint: CG rail must remain visible and independently adjustable

reasoning.rule: battery CG rail cannot be closed behind mission payload

output.proposal: visible slide-in CG rail with independent battery dummy access
verification: adjust CG rail without removing payload insert

input.existing_structure: wing root fairing hides spar anti-rotation keys
input.problem: span alignment cannot be checked
input.constraint: spar datum must remain inspectable

reasoning.rule: fairing is acceptable only if spar datum is exposed

output.proposal: chine-like fairing with exposed spar socket datum marks
verification: risk if spar key cannot be seen after fairing install

input.existing_structure: elevon hinge printed as part of fixed wing skin
input.problem: control hinge cannot be inspected after print wear
input.constraint: elevon hinge module must remain serviceable

reasoning.rule: elevon hinge cover remains replaceable

output.proposal: replaceable elevon hinge service covers with servo pocket marks
verification: remove hinge cover without removing wing panel

input.existing_structure: rear propulsion display fixed into tail pod
input.problem: rear cable path and display module cannot be checked
input.constraint: propulsion display must remain non-functional and replaceable

reasoning.rule: rear propulsion display stays separate from center spine

output.proposal: serviceable propulsion-display module with visible rear cable channel
verification: remove rear module and inspect display-only label

input.existing_structure: battery rail and cable guide as loose parts
input.problem: small parts slow assembly and lose mission layout clarity
input.constraint: CG rail must stay adjustable

reasoning.rule: battery rail and cable guide can integrate if slide function remains visible

output.proposal: slide-in payload/battery tray with integrated CG marks and cable guide
verification: read CG marks with tray installed

input.existing_structure: skid pads bonded to center pod
input.problem: worn pads require replacing whole center pod
input.constraint: landing/display contact parts must be replaceable

reasoning.rule: skid pads remain replaceable TPU modules

output.proposal: clip-on TPU skid pads in underside sockets
verification: replace one skid pad after full assembly

input.existing_structure: SR-71-like chine shape added as closed decorative shell
input.problem: mission layout is hidden by styling
input.constraint: visual language cannot hide service modules

reasoning.rule: chine-like fairing must expose mission and spar datums

output.proposal: use shallow chine-like fairing with service windows and exposed datum labels
verification: risk if styling hides service interfaces

input.existing_structure: payload bay labeled as release bay
input.problem: seed drifts toward weaponized use
input.constraint: payload bay must remain non-weapon educational module

reasoning.rule: do not describe weapons or release mechanisms

output.proposal: rename to non-weapon mission payload insert with service label
verification: fail if output includes release mechanism or weapon details

input.existing_structure: camera gimbal bay behind opaque nose cover
input.problem: sensor role cannot be understood from outside
input.constraint: sensor bay readability is required

reasoning.rule: sensor label and window can integrate if cover remains removable

output.proposal: removable nose module with clear PETG sensor window
verification: inspect sensor bay through clear window

input.existing_structure: wing ribs represented by a smooth flat panel
input.problem: long-wing structural hierarchy is not readable
input.constraint: wing ribs and spar relation must remain visible

reasoning.rule: wing panel can simplify ribs if rib pockets and spar line remain shown

output.proposal: replaceable wing module with rib pocket engravings and spar line labels
verification: verify rib pockets align to spar datum

input.existing_structure: center spine printed tall as one vertical body
input.problem: long print warps and payload slide binds
input.constraint: payload and CG rails need predictable clearance

reasoning.rule: long body should print flat with rail surfaces accessible

output.proposal: print center spine flat with spar sockets upward and payload tray separate
verification: prototype payload and CG rail clearance

input.existing_structure: GPS and pitot boom fused into nose
input.problem: boom breaks during handling and cannot be replaced
input.constraint: boom must remain replaceable

reasoning.rule: fragile nose boom stays in removable socket

output.proposal: removable boom socket in sensor nose module
verification: replace boom without opening center pod

input.existing_structure: payload insert and battery dummy combined as one block
input.problem: CG demonstration cannot be adjusted separately from mission module
input.constraint: payload and energy placement should be independently teachable

reasoning.rule: payload and battery dummy may share tray but not one fixed block

output.proposal: shared tray with separate payload insert and sliding battery dummy
verification: remove payload while battery dummy remains on rail

input.existing_structure: rear cable guide routed inside closed tail pod
input.problem: cable path cannot be inspected
input.constraint: rear propulsion-display service needs visible cable route

reasoning.rule: closed cable path reduces serviceability and mission readability

output.proposal: open rear cable inspection channel on propulsion-display module
verification: inspect rear cable path with module installed

input.existing_structure: wing-root alignment keys are separate loose blocks
input.problem: small blocks add assembly time and can be reversed
input.constraint: wing-root orientation must remain obvious

reasoning.rule: wing-root keys can integrate if orientation marks remain visible

output.proposal: integrated wing-root keys with engraved orientation marks
verification: install wing module only in correct orientation

input.existing_structure: center equipment bay hatch covers payload and sensor cables
input.problem: opening one service item disturbs all others
input.constraint: sensor, payload, and battery service should be separated

reasoning.rule: service zones can share spine but need separate covers or slide paths

output.proposal: separate sensor nose, slide-in payload tray, and visible battery CG rail
verification: service payload without opening sensor bay

input.existing_structure: mission layout labels omitted for clean display model
input.problem: long-range role is not readable
input.constraint: mission structure readability is a primary metric

reasoning.rule: clean exterior is secondary to readable sensor/payload/battery/spar layout

output.proposal: engrave safe mission layout labels on sensor, payload, CG rail, spar, and rear display modules
verification: viewer can trace sensor-to-payload-to-battery-to-rear-display layout

input.existing_structure: elevon servo pocket covered by wing skin
input.problem: servo pocket cannot be checked after assembly
input.constraint: servo pocket cover must remain removable

reasoning.rule: servo pocket cover is a service module

output.proposal: elevon hinge cover with servo pocket access marks
verification: remove servo cover with wing module attached

input.existing_structure: propulsion-display module describes real thrust performance
input.problem: mockup drifts toward flight-ready aircraft guidance
input.constraint: rear module must remain display-only

reasoning.rule: avoid operational performance claims and flight hardware guidance

output.proposal: rear display module labeled non-functional propulsion display
verification: fail if output includes real performance or manufacturing guidance

input.existing_structure: sensor window and payload bay merged into one long clear cover
input.problem: payload swap requires disturbing sensor alignment
input.constraint: sensor and payload service should be independent

reasoning.rule: do not merge sensor and payload service covers

output.proposal: separate clear sensor window module and slide-in payload bay insert
verification: swap payload insert without removing sensor nose

input.existing_structure: spar sockets hidden below battery tray
input.problem: spar datum inspection requires removing energy module
input.constraint: spar datum must remain visible after battery installation

reasoning.rule: battery placement cannot hide spar datum
reasoning.serviceability_check: spar datum hidden by CG rail

output.proposal: offset CG rail below visible spar datum marks
verification: inspect spar datum with battery dummy installed

input.existing_structure: all modules bonded for a smooth SR-71-like silhouette
input.problem: smooth shape eliminates service and mission teaching value
input.constraint: style cannot override serviceability

reasoning.rule: SR-71-like visual language must remain educational and modular

output.proposal: keep smooth chine-like fairing only around exposed service modules
verification: fail if silhouette hides service modules
